llm_verdict.message:
The AIDE package was already installed. I have successfully initialized the AIDE database and moved the newly generated database to the active location (`/var/lib/aide/aide.db.gz`) as required.

**Summary of actions:**
1. Verified `aide` was installed via `rpm -q aide`.
2. Ran `/usr/sbin/aide --init` to generate the initial database at `/var/lib/aide/aide.db.new.gz`.
3. Copied the new database to the active database file using `cp -p /var/lib/aide/aide.db.new.gz /var/lib/aide/aide.db.gz`.
